biological_replicate: RKO (colon carcinoma) cells were used for studying R-loops in cells.
experimental_design: To investigate whether HELQ plays a role in R-loop resolution in cells
factor_value: we compared fluorescence microscopy images stained for R-loops from HELQ+/+ cells with HELQ−/− and HELQ D463A cells.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates described (RKO and U2OS cells)
